channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Tanzania expands Tanga Port with new 300-metre berth to boost cargo capacity
item.description: The Tanzanian government has announced plans to construct a new 300-metre berth at Tanga Port to enhance its cargo handling capacity, driven by rising revenue and demand. Finance Minister Khamis Mussa...

item.title: Super Falcons Target WAFCON Title and World Cup Qualification
item.description: Super Falcons goalkeeper Chiamaka Nnadozie has emphasized that Nigeria will approach the 2026 Women’s Africa Cup of Nations (WAFCON) with focus, aiming to secure both the continental title and a World...

item.title: Schools Lead the Way in Sustainable Waste Management Practices
item.description: The article highlights how local schools across South Africa are playing a pivotal role in transforming waste management through initiatives like Operation Clean Spot and the Munch Program by the Sust...

item.title: Iran and the US Escalate Conflict Over Control of the Strait of Hormuz
item.description: The article details the escalating tensions between Iran and the United States over control of the strategically vital Strait of Hormuz. President Donald Trump's proposal to impose a 20% toll on shipp...

item.title: Eleanor Ekserdjian to Wed Sam Chatto: Potential Heirloom Tiara Choices for Royal Wedding
item.description: The engagement of Sam Chatto, grandson of Princess Margaret, and Eleanor Ekserdjian has sparked speculation about the heirloom tiaras she may wear at their upcoming royal wedding. The article explores...

item.title: Master Hanz Cua's Feng Shui Insights for July 14, 2026
item.description: The article discusses the Feng Shui predictions made by Master Hanz Cua specifically for July 14, 2026. It highlights how these predictions are part of a broader trend in lifestyle content that blends...

item.title: France and Spain battle for World Cup final spot in thrilling semi-final clash
item.description: The FIFA 2026 World Cup reaches a pivotal moment as France and Spain face off in a high-stakes semi-final at Dallas Stadium. The match, which determines a spot in the final against England or Argentin...

item.title: Mother frustrated as police decline to search for missing son based on last known location
item.description: Jamey Kleyn, 26, went missing on July 10 after being last seen in Salt River en route to work in Grassy Park. His mother, Melanie, reported him missing to Woodstock police on July 11, but claims offic...

item.title: Toronto Blue Jays Struggle to Turn Around Season Amid Playoff Hopes
item.description: The Toronto Blue Jays, eight months removed from their World Series near-miss, are facing an alarming downturn in the American League East Division. After a dismal first half of the season ending six ...

item.title: ASX opens higher amid oil price rise, Wall Street declines
item.description: Australian shares are set to open slightly down as oil prices surged following comments from Donald Trump about imposing a 20% toll on shipping in the Strait of Hormuz. Brent crude jumped 9% to over $...

item.title: Adamawa Gov Commences 3.7km Road Construction in Hildi to Boost Connectivity
item.description: The Adamawa State Government has kicked off the construction of a 3.7-kilometre road in Hildi Town, showing Governor Ahmadu Umaru Fintiri's dedication to improving infrastructure and quality of life f...

item.title: 16-year-old accused of attacking friend over yosi dispute
item.description: A 16-year-old individual is accused of physically assaulting a friend following an alleged disagreement over yosi, a slang term for a type of drug. The incident, reported on July 14, 2026, highlights ...

item.title: Toronto shooting suspect was awaiting sentencing in torture case and had also been named in a U.S. gun-smuggling indictment
item.description: Toronto Police have charged 25-year-old Omar Abdul Singateh with multiple offences following a shooting outside Rebel nightclub in the early hours of Sunday. Investigators allege that Singateh opened ...

item.title: Whistleblowers Report Shady Deals in Trump's Kennedy Center Renovation Project
item.description: A new report reveals that whistleblowers have exposed questionable practices and unethical contracts during the Trump administration's renovation of the Kennedy Center. The investigation, led by Senat...

item.title: Migrant boat disaster off Libya leaves 100 missing
item.description: A migrant boat carrying hundreds of people has capsized off the coast of Libya, leaving at least 100 individuals missing. The incident, which occurred in the Mediterranean Sea, has raised urgent conce...

item.title: Former Ethekwini Mayor Zandile Gumede Joins MK Party as Deputy Convenor in KZN
item.description: Former Ethekwini mayor Zandile Gumede has officially joined the Umkhonto weSizwe Party (MKP) as deputy provincial convenor in KwaZulu-Natal, marking a significant shift in South African political alle...

item.title: BJP Accuses Congress of Discrediting Election Commission, Cites Former PM Manmohan Singh
item.description: The BJP has accused the Congress party of having a habitual tendency to discredit the Election Commission of India (EC), citing former Prime Minister Manmohan Singh's remarks about the EC's pain over ...

item.title: Manny Pacquiao's Team Plans Exhibition Fight for Later This Year
item.description: The camp of legendary boxer Manny Pacquiao is reportedly considering organizing an exhibition fight later in 2026, according to a news article published by ABS-CBN on July 14, 2026. The announcement c...

item.title: Manitoba First Nation Faces Emergency Response Challenges Amid Wildfire Crisis
item.description: The O-Pipon-Na-Piwin Cree Nation in northern Manitoba is grappling with the aftermath of wildfires that have displaced hundreds of residents and exposed critical gaps in emergency preparedness. While ...

item.title: New Zealand's healthcare system faces corporate ownership shifts with implications for patient care
item.description: New Zealand's health system is undergoing significant changes with the passage of the Healthy Futures (Pae Ora) Amendment Act, which prioritises 'timely access to quality healthcare' over previous Māo...
